docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KELLY YIP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAURICE SHELBY IS PRESENT.
